key_metric: Fwd P/E 20.4 prices full EPS recovery; ROE 12% vs historical 25% — quality not yet restored
one_line: V-recovered 82% in price while earnings grew 0.7%; market is betting on normalization, not observing it
bull: FCF yield 4.57% provides floor; fwd P/E 20 is reasonable if op margins recover to 9-10% and ROE re-rates toward 20%+
bear: No margin of safety at -0.3% from 52w high; trailing P/E 32 demands ~57% EPS recovery that has not materialized; MLR risk could reset the narrative
margin_of_safety: None — full-recovery price with execution risk; a business trading at fwd P/E 20 with 0.7% earnings growth and ROE at half its historical average offers no cushion if recovery stalls
